title: rubus × piletocarpus var. longifolius
intro: Rubus × piletocarpus var. longifolius, also known as the Raspberry Bramble, is a hybrid species of plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × piletocarpus var. longifolius include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
